title: Ice Cream
description: A refreshed feeling of the game, keeping the original textures in mind
body:
![Ice Cream Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddc73c6d1caa97f2bf72426ea9326e0c3996cd98.png) ---
--- Ice Cream is a resource pack that refreshes the looks of Minecraft while maintaining the vanilla feel of the game.
This pack features a bunch of new textures that remain similair to the base game. The perfect resource pack for those who want to stay true to vanilla! (hence why it's name :P) --- ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1AThh79Y/images/06742facfd8b865a2a6947765e7302134128ca50.png) ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1AThh79Y/images/1c28059c4d670133f30e16dde32d731847e55cda.png) ![Screenshot 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1AThh79Y/images/d476d98f065bf5319246f435047cd83247c76bbd.png) ![Screenshot 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1AThh79Y/images/99a6678f82bc741069095722c9de53b2571f2d46.png) --- ## Frequently Asked Questions
How do I install this pack? I'd recommend following [this](https://www.planetminecraft.com/blog/how-to-install-minecraft-texture-packs-4615399/) guide on PlanetMinecraft. Enjoy!
When is the next update coming out? Personally I'm not the greatest at making deadlines and make this just for fun :P
When I feel like the update is ready I'll just release it. If you want to keep up with the updates, be sure to follow the resource pack here on Modrinth and/or join my Discord server [here](https://discord.gg/fV9aby4XGG)
Does Ice Cream have any add-ons? Yes! Ice Cream has multiple add-ons available for you to download! My own add-ons exist out of;
[Ice Cream 3D Add-On](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-add-on) [Uniform Tools](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/uniform-tools)
On top of that, Ice Cream also adds support for Enchanted_Games' [Tasty Items](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tasty-items) \ [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)' Hunger Preview Just be sure to put my add-ons above Ice Cream and the other ones below it in the selected resource packs screen. Like this; ![Selected packs](https://i.postimg.cc/NGWz62XR/selectedgif.gif)
I've found a bug or got a suggestion! Hi! Thank you for your contribution, join my Discord server [here](https://discord.gg/fV9aby4XGG) and feel free to show it in #general.
Terms Of Service You're allowed to alter and edit any of Ice Cream's textures as long as you don't distribute it. Keep it to yourself.
If you want to create your own add-on for Ice Cream, feel free to! Just be sure to provide a link to the Modrinth Page.
--- **Please note:** This resource pack is currently in a beta stage. This means that some textures may or may not be changed in a future version. During the beta period, Ice Cream will receive multiple updates.
